'''鈭歾h-y-p-k''' ('''kazhaypekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebroyde|bebroyde]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-p-k
|-

| [[Transitive verb]]
|-

| [[Wikt:bebroyde|bebroyde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-y-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazhaypekoko
|}
